headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.

headlines.title: Senate Republicans grow increasingly frustrated with Trump blindsiding them
headlines.description: As President Donald Trump scrambles to wrap up his war with Iran, he’s escalating another one much closer to home, against members of his own party in Congress.

headlines.title: Read the text of the Iran-U.S. memorandum of understanding
headlines.description: A senior U.S. administration official provided the 14-point plan after questions swirled about what was in it.

headlines.title: The ‘King of the North’ wants to lead Britain. First he must beat the far-right in a special election.
headlines.description: Andy Burnham wants to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer. First he must beat the far-right in a vote Thursday.

headlines.title: Trump touts deal with Iran as administration releases text of agreement
headlines.description: President Trump touted the preliminary peace deal with Iran, which now leads to 60 days of further talks. Critics said the deal gives away too much to the Iranian regime. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Senate postpones hearing for DNI nominee Clayton after Trump tells him not to show up
headlines.description: A confirmation hearing for Jay Clayton, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the next director of national intelligence, was abruptly postponed after the president said he was “cancelling it” over political disagreements with Democrats. NBC News' Melanie Zanona reports on how pulling the nomination could affect the re-authorization of FISA.

headlines.title: Iran’s ballistic missiles not mentioned in agreement but Trump says they ‘have to have some’
headlines.description: As the White House releases key details of its agreement with Iran, NBC News Correspondents Matt Bradley, Gabe Gutierrez, Sahil Kapur, Dan De Luce and “Cosmopolitics” podcast host Elise Labott join Meet the Press NOW to report on the latest reactions to the proposal.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Knicks set to be first NBA team to visit White House under Trump
headlines.description: The president’s hometown team is expected to visit the White House after NBA champions skipped the visit throughout his first term.

headlines.title: Republicans in Washington on edge over Iran deal as Trump touts its merits
headlines.description: Trump is framing a tentative peace deal with Iran as a victory for the U.S., but fractures in the Republican Party suggest that could be a hard sell.

headlines.title: Why Trump’s Iran agreement could be a tough sell for Republicans: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we explore the domestic political challenges facing President Donald Trump on the Iran agreement.
